heading: Allotments: members of Coast Guard
label: 703 Allotments: members of Coast Guard
text: Members of the Coast Guard may, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Homeland Security, make allotments from their pay and allowances.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70314:464.[None.]The words “members of the Coast Guard” are substituted for the words “officers and enlisted men”, since together they compose the entire membership.

Amendments2002— substituted “Secretary of Homeland Security” for “Secretary of Transportation”.Pub. L. 107–2961968— substituted “Secretary of Transportation” for “Secretary of the Treasury”.Pub. L. 90–623

Effective Date of 2002 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the date of transfer of the Coast Guard to the Department of Homeland Security, see , set out as a note under , Armed Forces.Pub. L. 107–296section 1704(g) of Pub. L. 107–296section 101 of Title 10
